signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The official full-scale rollout of Ripple USD (RLUSD) stablecoin across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum has been confirmed as of April 18, 2026, driving massive capital influx, record XRPL transaction volume, and XRP surges amid heightened institutional adoption.[1]

signals.headline: Spot XRP ETFs Reach 6 Active in U
signals.raw:
Spot XRP ETFs Reach 6 Active in U.S. with $1B AUM | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Six U.S. spot XRP ETFs are now active by mid-April 2026 (including debuts from Franklin Templeton, Grayscale, Bitwise, 21Shares, Amplify, and XRPC with $250M first-day AUM), holding ~787M XRP in custody and pulling $224M inflows in early April, shifting rally dynamics to spot-led flows.[3]

signals.headline: SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple's long-standing SEC lawsuit is now "officially in the rearview mirror," clearing regulatory hurdles alongside XRP ETF approvals entering final stages and SEC-CFTC framework progress.[1][3]

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Launch on April 15 | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Launch on April 15 | YES | MED confidence**  
Rakuten Wallet launched on April 15, 2026, coinciding with XRP's first 2026 touch above $1.50 (intraday high $1.51094 on April 17), though followed by a pullback to ~$1.43 by April 19.[3]
